assertion_results.text: Output must reference the recent production incident explicitly
assertion_results.evidence: Opening: 'You experienced a data-corrupting race condition in payment processing that affected 2,100 users, with no monitoring in place to catch it. That is the defining fact of this assessment.'

assertion_results.text: Output must give at least one short-term action item
assertion_results.evidence: Priority 1 ('Stop the bleeding, this week') contains 3 concrete actions: audit payment service, add concurrency tests, set up Sentry alerts.

assertion_results.text: Output must recommend monitoring or observability as a priority
assertion_results.evidence: Priority 1.3: 'Set up Sentry alerts properly, not just collection.' Priority 2.1: 'Introduce observability with intent, not just error capture' including structured logging and metrics layer.

assertion_results.text: Output must not recommend psychological safety without citing a specific data point
assertion_results.evidence: Psychological safety is not mentioned anywhere in the report.

assertion_results.text: Output must reference the race condition or production data corruption
assertion_results.evidence: Opening and throughout: 'data-corrupting race condition in payment processing.' Priority 1.2: 'Add targeted concurrency tests to the payment service... a regression harness for exactly the class of bug that just hit you.'
